name: Weekly AI Agent Digest
sources: Recent developments in AI agent frameworks, tool use, and autonomous coding
contentBrief: Summarize the most notable developments in AI agents and autonomous coding tools. Focus on what practitioners should pay attention to — new frameworks, capability breakthroughs, and emerging patterns.
formatBrief: Professional but accessible tone. Start with a 2-sentence executive summary, then 3-4 thematic sections. Use subheadings. Keep it under 1500 words.
